summary: Iteration-11 verified end-to-end (frontend-only, no backend changes). PRICING FAQ — data-testid='pricing-faq' renders below comparison table; all 8 <details> elements present (pricing-faq-0..7); clicking summary opens <dd>; final CTA eyebrow now '§ 05'; exactly 1 <script type='application/ld+json' data-pricing-faq='1'> in document.head; JSON.parse yields @type='FAQPage' and mainEntity.length===8 with first Q='What does the 15% platform fee actually cover?' and acceptedAnswer present. EXPERT STICKY CTA — at 390x844 viewport, data-testid='expert-sticky-cta' is visible at bottom (bounding box y=775 in 844 viewport, h=69), shows '$380/hr · Kwame · Available next week · Message', data-testid='expert-sticky-message' button present, position remains y=775 after window.scrollTo(0,1500) (fixed-position holds), at 1280x800 the same testid is_visible()===false. DASHBOARD — with seeded brief (user_id=user_admin_84f1d804, status='open', proposal_count=3), data-testid='dashboard-resume-strip' is visible with eyebrow 'Pick up where you left off · Proposals to review', title 'TEST_ITER11 Brief Resume Strip', meta '3 proposals waiting · Engineering', CTA 'Review proposals'; href='/briefs/brief_iter11_test_…'. Resume-strip priority correctly chooses VETTING over brief when both exist (vetting-in-progress beats brief-with-proposals per spec). With one brief + zero conversations/contracts, dashboard-empty count = 2 (Active contracts + Conversations), each with svg icon + primary CTA + (where applicable) secondary CTA. No 'Rendered more hooks' React error observed in console. Header on signed-out home: 4 primary nav items ('01 Network', '02 Managed', '03 Pricing', '04 Journal') + 'For experts →' + 'Sign in' + 'Post a brief' — all present. VETTING TRACKER — with vetting_applications.stage='screening_call', data-testid='vetting-tracker' renders with 'Your progress · Stage 3 / 5 · Live screening call · Complete 50%', progress bar inner-div style.width='50%', and 3-column grid 'Right now / Typical time / Next step' with correct copy ('30-min call with a senior matcher. Pass to continue.' / '30 min · schedule within 3 days' / 'Paid test project'). With stage='approved' the tracker disappears (verified). ADMIN BLOG EMPTY — production DB already has published posts so data-testid='blog-empty-posts' correctly does NOT render; static review of /app/src/components/AdminBlogTab.tsx lines 121-133 confirms the empty block JSX with data-testid='blog-empty-posts' and the 'blog-empty-new-post' button wired to setEditing('new'). Did NOT delete production blog rows just to demo the empty state.

minor.issue: AUTH_RL_MAX=5 / 900s in-process bucket trips on rapid test runs (had to `supervisorctl restart backend` twice during iter-11). Pre-existing carry-forward from iter-9/10.

issues: PRE-EXISTING (carry-forward iter-6..10): shipper-api-production-3b99.up.railway.app analytics calls throw 2-3 CORS errors per page load. No functional impact.

action_items: PRE-EXISTING (carry-forward iter-6..10): Remove/proxy shipper-api railway analytics calls — every page load throws CORS errors.
PRE-EXISTING (carry-forward iter-9/10): /api/blog/assets/{fid} Cache-Control header still overridden by global no-store middleware.
PRE-EXISTING (carry-forward iter-9/10): <link rel=alternate type=application/rss+xml> on /blog and /blog/:slug still hardcodes https://worksoy.com instead of import.meta.env.VITE_BACKEND_URL.
INFO: Iter-11 features fully verified. No action items for E1 from this iteration.
critical_code_review_comments: DashboardPage.tsx — useMemo for `resume` correctly placed BEFORE the early-return loader (line ~145 area). No `Rendered more hooks` warning fired during 4-5 navigation cycles.

DashboardPage resume priority is unread-message > vetting-in-progress > brief-with-proposals > active-contract (verified: with a brief AND vetting both present, the strip linked to /vetting; with only the brief, it linked to /briefs/{id}). Matches spec.

VettingPage.STAGES now includes `eta` per stage (line 43-49). currentIdx math: `Math.round((currentIdx / (STAGES.length - 1)) * 100)` — for screening_call (idx=2) on a 5-stage array (length 5) this gives round(2/4*100)=50%, correct. Be aware: 'approved' stage is idx=4 → 100%, but tracker is hidden when isApproved so this is moot.
PricingPage.useEffect JSON-LD injection has clean cleanup (`return () => { s.remove(); }`), so navigating away does not leak the script tag.
ExpertDetailPage sticky bar uses `lg:hidden` (Tailwind: hidden ≥1024px). Verified hidden at 1280 width, visible at 390. The spacer `h-20 lg:hidden` div correctly prevents content from being obscured.

AdminBlogTab.tsx line 121-133 — `blog-empty-posts` wrapper has Sparkles icon + 'Write the first post' button (data-testid='blog-empty-new-post') calling setEditing('new'). Not visually demoed because production DB has published posts (deleting them just to demo the empty state would have been destructive).

ExpertDetailPage sticky bar reuses the same handleMessage handler (button onClick={handleMessage}) — clicking the sticky 'Message' triggers the same /api/messages thread-open flow as the desktop aside button. Verified via static code read; live click would have required a non-admin user with a different expert (admin's UI flow may differ).
All 8 FAQ <details> entries open independently — using <details>/<summary> native HTML means no JS state mgmt needed and they all keep state across re-renders for free.

success_rate.backend: N/A — frontend-only iteration, no backend changes shipped. Existing /api/vetting/me, /api/briefs/mine, /api/auth/login all returned 200 for the test flows.
success_rate.frontend: 100% — all 5 iter-11 features verified: resume strip (with seeded brief), 2-of-up-to-4 dashboard-empty states with icons + CTAs, mobile expert sticky CTA (visible mobile, hidden desktop), pricing FAQ section + 8 details + JSON-LD FAQPage with 8 mainEntity + § 05 final eyebrow, vetting tracker showing Stage 3/5 50% with all 3 columns and hiding on approved, admin blog-empty-posts JSX testids confirmed via static review (not visually demoed — production has posts).

test_credentials: admin@worksoy.com / WorkSoyAdmin2026! — works after backend restart resets the rate-limit bucket.
seed_data_creation: Per run: 1 brief (id=brief_iter11_test_1781288639009, title='TEST_ITER11 Brief Resume Strip'), 1 vetting_application (id=vap_test_iter11), 1 expert (id=exp_test_iter11_admin) — ALL cleaned at end of run via mongo deleteMany ({title:/^TEST_ITER11/}, {user_id:'user_admin_84f1d804'}). DB is back to clean state.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vetting collection is `vetting_applications` (not `vetting` — that's an unused legacy collection). Admin user_id = `user_admin_84f1d804`. To re-seed for vetting tracker UI test: db.experts.insertOne({id:'exp_test_iter11_admin', user_id:'user_admin_84f1d804', name:'Admin Test', headline:'…', category:'Engineering', specialties:['python'], hourlyRate:150, isPublished:false, vetting_stage:'screening_call', created_at:new Date(), …}) + db.vetting_applications.insertOne({id:'vap_test_iter11', user_id, expert_id, stage:'screening_call', history:[], created_at:new Date(), updated_at:new Date()}). Auth rate-limit bucket trips after ~5 login attempts in 15 min — `sudo supervisorctl restart backend` to reset. Resume-strip priority: unread-msg > vetting-in-progress > brief-with-proposals > active-contract — verify with the right precondition. Mobile sticky CTA testid present DOM-wide but hidden via `lg:hidden` Tailwind class — use is_visible() or boundingBox null check at desktop widths.
rca of the issue: No new bugs in iter-11. All 5 UX additions land cleanly. The two pre-existing carry-forwards from iter-9/10 (Cache-Control on /api/blog/assets, hardcoded RSS host in <link rel=alternate>) are unrelated to this iteration and unchanged.
